doc_title: Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews — PRISMA 2020 Statement
label: partial
reason: The PRISMA 2020 citation and DOI are genuine, but the "Citation Verification" and "Common Errors in Citation Practice" sections are fabricated content not found in the actual PRISMA 2020 statement.
